description.p: Mariner is a GNOME Files clone built with node-gtk and TypeScript on GTK4 and libadwaita. It drives the same Adwaita widgets as Nautilus, so the interface feels native to the GNOME desktop.

ul.li: Grid and list views with adjustable zoom
Tabbed browsing with per-tab history and a breadcrumb path bar
A places sidebar with bookmarks and mounted volumes
Copy, move, rename, trash and delete with live progress
Recursive, out-of-process search that streams results as they arrive
Archive extraction and compression, batch rename, and image thumbnails
